children.name: text
children.textContent: The 90-min Acme Corp revision call cut your effective hourly rate to . Adding a 2-revision policy would recover .

children.name: div
children.textContent: Nexus Health cutting margin in half

children.name: div
children.textContent: You've logged 11 hrs this month at ~$87/hr effective. Your target is $180/hr. Revision requests have doubled.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg>

children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#FFB347" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clock" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Acme Corp's revision loops average 3.2 per project. Adding a 2-revision cap would recover ~$1,020/month.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#FFB347" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Rush jobs profit 2x with Maya assigned

children.name: div
children.textContent: Last 8 rush jobs: avg margin 67% when Maya handles delivery vs 29% when you do. Consider routing all rush work.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#5B8DEF" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: At current pace, Drift Labs generates $172/hr effective — your best client. A 20% retainer increase = +$620/mo.
